name: Gel S.p.A.
summary: Gel S.p.A. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of water treatment products in Italy. The company offers filters, water softeners, dosing units, reverse osmosis, and conditioning products for private users; and leachate, medical water, mobile plants, food and beverage, drinking water, and desalination solutions for industrial users. It also provides magnetic scale reducers, column filters, metering pumps, antilegionella systems, UV sterilizers, water purifiers, measuring and control instruments, and neutralizing filters for acidic condensates; descaling chemicals, technical products, and equipment for flushing and filling; and conditioners, such as heating, cooling, solar thermal, and water systems, as well as steam generators for professional users. GEL S.p.A. was founded in 1979 and is based in Castelfidardo, Italy.
